LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WAHR FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT GOMES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. BASED ON THE INFORMATION PROVIDED, DEFENDANT HAS SUFFICIENT MONTHLY FUNDS TO SERVICE THE DEBT. AFTER DISCUSSION, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $150.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS (PER PAY PERIOD) COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., 415-851-5297, appearance@vakninlaw.com, Specially Appearing for Plaintiff Wahr Financial Group, LLC (via Zoom Conference)
Louise Gomes, 415-729-5172, Defendant in Pro Per

Defendant did not properly contest the court's tenative ruling. All parties are present.

Hearing is held. Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WAHR FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Gomes' claim of exemption is denied. Based on the information provided, defendant has sufficient monthly funds to service the debt. After discussion, the Court orders defendant to pay $150.00 every two weeks/pay period. Court to prepare order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
